title: LinkedEmployee
description: The employee this entity is linked to.

id.title: Employee ID
id.description: A unique identifier for an object.

display_id.title: Display ID
display_id.description: The display ID of the employee. For best performance, send this field (the employee number) instead of the GUID in the id field.

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: The display name of the employee.
